creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Log:

  - Convert to USES=pathfix
  - Convert to INSTALL_TARGET=install-strip
  - Convert to PORTDOCS
  - Fix whitespace
  - Bump PORTREVISION for [1], [2]
